TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Dennis_Boyd, title = Dennis_Boyd, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dennis_Boyd} }

S.FORM: Dennis Boyd nilecuhan i Portsmouth, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Boyd i 1977 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 72, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Jazz putiput. 5 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1954 a mihca, Dennis Boyd, miunduay.
S.PHON: dənnis bojd nir~ɾəʦuħan i portsmoutħ, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. dənnis bojd i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw orr~ɾəans *azz putiput. * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dənnis bojd, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Dennis Boyd nilecuhan i Portsmouth, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Dennis Boyd i 1977 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 4 ku uwac atu silsil 72, namapili' tu nu New Orleans Jazz putiput. 5 a bulad 21 a demiad, 1954 a mihca, Dennis Boyd, miunduay.
S.PHON: dənnis bojd nir~ɾəʦuħan i portsmoutħ, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. dənnis bojd i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw orr~ɾəans *azz putiput. * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, dənnis bojd, miunduaj.
